workflowPurpose: Construction website lead intake follow-up draft workflow proof.
proposedAction: Create one inactive n8n draft workflow, export workflow JSON, validate workflow JSON, record audit, connector result, and cost ledger records, then stop.
expectedWorkflowBehavior: Receive a future website contact form payload through a webhook node while the workflow remains inactive.
Validate required fields using a local workflow validation step.
Create an in-workflow draft lead object or placeholder task object only.
Create an internal follow-up task object only.
Log the intake event inside the workflow execution path.
Stop before sending any outbound message or calling any real external service.

expectedNodes.notes: Webhook is for draft workflow shape only. Do not activate the workflow or expose a live intake endpoint.
No database, CRM, Postgres, or production lead write is allowed in this proof.
The task object is a placeholder output inside the workflow only, not a live task in any external system.
No email, SMS, WhatsApp, posting, outreach, phone, or voice action is allowed.

credentialPolicy: Do not create or store credentials in AG OS, n8n workflow JSON, docs, logs, or PR text.
Do not use Postgres, email, SMS, WhatsApp, CRM, form provider, or domain credentials.
If credentials are required, stop and request a new approval package.
preExecutionChecks: Confirm active approval lock approval-20260704-n8n-draft-workflow-proof exists and is unexpired.
Run npm.cmd run validate in AG OS.
Run npm.cmd run boot:check in AG OS.
Run node --test tests/*.test.mjs in AG OS.
Confirm n8n connector scope is limited to creating one inactive draft workflow.
Confirm no credentials, activation, outbound message, real external API, production workflow, Lead Gen workflow, or AI Receptionist workflow action is requested.
validationPlan: Create only an inactive n8n draft workflow if later approved.
Export the workflow JSON after draft creation.
Validate exported workflow JSON for required draft-only nodes, inactive state, missing credentials, no outbound integrations, no real API calls, and no production workflow references.
Record the export and validation result in AG OS.
Do not activate, execute with real payloads, or connect credentials.
rollbackPlan: If the draft workflow is created with the wrong name or scope, stop and record an audit event.
If the workflow is accidentally active, immediately deactivate it if safe, record an incident and audit event, and notify the owner.
If credentials, outbound messaging, real API calls, production workflow changes, Lead Gen changes, or AI Receptionist changes appear in the draft, stop and do not proceed.
Archive or delete the draft workflow only after owner approval unless immediate exposure risk exists.
Keep the exported workflow JSON and validation result as evidence for any cleanup decision.
stopConditions: No active approval lock for this exact n8n draft workflow proof.
Any outbound email, SMS, WhatsApp, posting, live outreach, phone, or voice action is needed.
Any real external API call is needed.
Any production n8n workflow, Lead Gen workflow, or AI Receptionist workflow would be touched.
Any deployment, domain, DNS, paid tool, customer data, production data, credential, or Constitution change becomes necessary.
AG OS validation, boot check, runtime tests, workflow export, or workflow JSON validation fails.
